description.value: **Benefit:** You can attempt aÂ Sense Motive Â check as aÂ free action Â to deduce a foe’s martial training after observing the foe’s movements for at least 1 minute or observing the foe’s attacks for at least 2 rounds. The DC equals 20 + the creature’sÂ base attack bonus Â or 10 + the creature’sÂ Bluff Â orÂ Disguise Â modifier, whichever is higher. If you succeed, you learn the foe’sÂ base attack bonus Â and oneÂ combat feat Â it has, and you learn an additionalÂ combat feat Â it has for every 5 points by which you exceed the DC. If you fail this check against a particular foe, you can’t try again against that foe until you gain more ranks in Sense Motive.
